models.name: Formula A (original)
models.superseded_reason: cache_read weight was zero; dominant token type ignored

models.name: Formula E
models.superseded_reason: Streaming dedup bug: ~1.86x token overcounting inflated all weights. cr=0.58 and limit=374M were artifacts of the bug, not real physics. Once dedup fixed, API-pricing-anchored weights (cr=0.1, limit=599.2M) fit the data correctly.
models.notes: Cache reads are NOT free per this model. Weight 0.58 was later determined to be an overcounting artifact — the true weight (0.1) matches Anthropic API pricing directly.

models.name: Formula A
models.formula: CU = sum_over_models( model_mult * (input*1.0 + output*5.0 + cache_creation*1.25 + cache_read*0.1) )
models.notes: All token weights and model multipliers are derived directly from Anthropic published API pricing ratios — zero empirical fitting. Only the weekly_limit (599.2M) is fitted. Requires streaming dedup: only count JSONL entries where stop_reason != null, else ~1.86x overcounting occurs.

derivation.model_multipliers: Ratio of per-model input prices vs Sonnet baseline ($75/$15=5/3 Opus, 1.0 Sonnet, $1/$3=1/3 Haiku)
derivation.cache_creation_weight: API cache write/input price ratio: $3.75/$3=1.25 (Sonnet 5-min TTL)
